title: chromolaena connivens
intro: Chromolaena connivens is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, roots, and flowers, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. Chromolaena connivens is valued for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use, and is also used in traditional folk remedies for its purported health benefits.
